content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Icarus Digital Marketing: Meta Media Buyer Anywhere in the World Wyoming Paid Social Media Advertising Sales and Marketing Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://icarusdigitalmarketing.com/">https://icarusdigitalmarketing.com/</a> </p> <p>Position: Meta Media Buyer (Ecommerce)</p> <p>Company: Icarus Digital Marketing</p> <p>Location: Remote (Philippines or Latin America)</p> <p>Salary: $1,400 - $1,700 USD per month</p> <p>Employment Type: Full-time</p> <p><strong>CRITICAL REQUIREMENT:</strong></p> <p>You MUST have run Meta ads for ecommerce/DTC brands with real budgets. If your background is lead gen, apps, or local business ads, don't apply.</p> <p><strong>About Icarus:</strong></p> <p>We're a specialized paid media agency working with high-risk brands (CBD, cannabis, nicotine, vapes, peptides). We focus on Meta Ads and high-converting funnels for brands that face advertising restrictions.</p> <p><strong>The Role:</strong></p> <p>Own a portfolio of 10-20 ecommerce client ad accounts end to end. Check spend and performance daily and act on the numbers: scale winners, kill losers, restructure when fatigue creeps in. Build full-funnel campaigns. Run structured creative testing with our creative director and scale what wins. Make the budget calls, including telling a client no when the data isn't there. Lead client reporting calls and strategy reviews. Spot funnel problems beyond the ads (checkout drop-off, tracking issues). Handle ad rejections and policy pauses fast.</p> <p><strong>What You Need:</strong></p> <p>✅ 2+ years hands-on Meta Ads Manager experience on ecommerce/DTC accounts</p> <p>✅ A track record you can walk us through: stores you ran, what you changed, what happened</p> <p>✅ Know ecommerce numbers cold (ROAS, AOV, CPA, frequency, add-to-cart to purchase)</p> <p>✅ Can explain WHY campaigns perform the way they do, not just read dashboards</p> <p>✅ Confident on client calls: present results, defend strategy, push back with data</p> <p>✅ Excellent English - confident on video calls</p> <p>✅ Comfortable working with CBD/cannabis/nicotine brands (no prior restricted-ads experience needed - we train you)</p> <p>✅ Available during US business hours (overlap required)</p> <p><strong>What We Offer:</strong></p> <p><strong>$1,400-$1,700/month</strong></p> <p>Fully remote</p> <p>Training on advertising in restricted verticals - a skill very few buyers have</p> <p>Long-term growth potential</p> <p>To Apply:</p> <h2><strong>Send a WhatsApp message to <br>Darko: +38976488239 and <br>Antonis +491721853990</strong></h2> <h2><strong>Include:</strong></h2> <p>Your CV/resume</p> <p>Brief message with:</p> <p>Which brands/agencies you ran Meta ads for</p> <p>The largest monthly Meta budget you personally managed</p> <p>One store result you're proud of</p> <p>We'll schedule a quick call if you're a fit.</p> <p>Only apply if you have actual ecommerce media buying experience.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/icarus-digital-marketing-meta-media-buyer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/icarus-digital-marketing-meta-media-buyer</a></p> Wed, 22 Jul 2026 00:31:02 +0000 Fri, 21 Aug 2026 00:31:02 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/icarus-digital-marketing-meta-media-buyer https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/icarus-digital-marketing-meta-media-buyer Sandtex: Sales Rep. Anywhere in the World 🇲🇽 Mexico Texas Customer Support, Sales, and Customer Service Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0006/6981/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Brownsville, Texas <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://www.sandtexusa.com">http://www.sandtexusa.com</a> </p> <p><strong>We are an American company, seeking a Mexico based customer service rep.</strong></p> <p>All the work will be done remotely and from home. English is required.</p> <p>You will be expected to provide your own laptop, internet and cell phone.</p> <p><strong>Who we are:</strong></p> <p>We are the leading Mexican-focused industrial distributor in the United States. Since 1993 we have been supplying our Mexican customers with all the industrial equipment they need to keep their factories running, and always with a smile. We currently have an opening for an Customer Service Representative to join our team.</p> <p><strong>Who you are:</strong></p> <p>We're looking for a smart organized customer service rep.</p> <p>Duties include:</p> <ul> <li>quoting items</li> <li>answering client emails</li> <li>talking to American vendors</li> </ul> <p><strong>What you bring:</strong></p> <p>- Exceptional organizational and multi-tasking skills</p> <p>- Fluency in English &amp; Spanish</p> <p>- Unparalleled attention to detail</p> <p>This is a fun, fast-paced job and we pride ourselves on our family environment, and in supporting each other to do our best possible work each day.</p> <p>Salary:</p> <p>$30,000 MXN/Mes (Brutos)</p> <p><strong>How to apply:</strong></p> <p><strong>If interested, please take our assessment at:</strong></p> <p><a href="https://apply.select.wonderlic.com/TY6NFZ/Sandtex"><strong>https://apply.wonscore.io/SS3Q3S/Sandtex</strong></a></p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sandtex-sales-rep">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sandtex-sales-rep</a></p> Tue, 21 Jul 2026 23:39:01 +0000 Thu, 20 Aug 2026 23:39:01 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sandtex-sales-rep https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sandtex-sales-rep Center for Food Safety: Staff Attorney Anywhere in the World California Writing, Legal, and Legal Research All Other Remote Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> San Francisco <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.centerforfoodsafety.org/">https://www.centerforfoodsafety.org/</a> </p> <h2 class="css-of4wst">Staff Attorney</h2> <div class="css-182q8w0"> <div class="css-1nb1zny"> <div class=""> <div class="ATS_htmlPreview"> <p><strong>Location: The position is preferred to be based in either Portland, Oregon, or the San Francisco Bay Area, California, in a hybrid home-office model, but fully remote is also considered for the right candidate.</strong><br><br></p> <h4><strong>TO APPLY FOR THIS ROLE, PLEASE VISIT THE </strong><a class="css-173makr-linkStyle" href="https://ats.rippling.com/center-for-food-safety/jobs"><strong>CENTER FOR FOOD SAFETY JOB BOARD</s
